basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Banaras Hindu University (IIT BHU) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitbhu.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation for Female/SC/ST/OBC Physically Handicapped Candidate as per govt. norms

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech in Biochemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Bioengineering, Bioprocess Engineering/Technology, Chemical Engineering/Technology, Industrial Microbiology, M.Sc. in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Genetics, Biochemistry, Bioinformatics, Food Sciences, Molecular Biology, Genetic Science/Engg, Botany, Zoology, Life Sciences and Environmental technology with GATE/NET or equivalent
qualification.details: First class in (i) M. Tech. in Biochemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Bioengineering, Bioprocess Engineering/ Technology, Chemical Engineering / Technology, Industrial Microbiology or (ii) M.Sc. in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Genetics, Biochemistry, Bioinformatics, Food Sciences, Molecular Biology, Genetic Science/ Engg, Botany, Zoology, Life Sciences and Environmental technology with qualification in GATE/NET or National level equivalent examination.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_banaras_h: M.Tech in Biochemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Bioengineering, Bioprocess Engineering/Technology, Chemical Engineering/Technology, Industrial Microbiology, M.Sc. in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Genetics, Biochemistry, Bioinformatics, Food Sciences, Molecular Biology, Genetic Science/Engg, Botany, Zoology, Life Sciences and Environmental technology with GATE/NET or equivalent

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: First class in (i) M. Tech. in Biochemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Bioengineering, Bioprocess Engineering/ Technology, Chemical Engineering / Technology, Industrial Microbiology or (ii) M.Sc. in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Genetics, Biochemistry, Bioinformatics, Food Sciences, Molecular Biology, Genetic Science/ Engg, Botany, Zoology, Life Sciences and Environmental technology with qualification in GATE/NET or National level equivalent examination.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation for Female/SC/ST/OBC Physically Handicapped Candidate as per govt. norms

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT BHU is 14th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a First Class M.Tech or M.Sc. degree in relevant fields like Biotechnology, Chemical Engineering, Microbiology, or Life Sciences, along with a valid GATE/NET qualification.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow post is 28 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month, plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow vacancy?
faq.answer: You need to apply via email by sending your complete application along with all required documents to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Examination followed by an Interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT BHU offer any age relaxation for specific categories?
faq.answer: Yes, IIT BHU offers age relaxation for Female, SC, ST, OBC, and Physically Handicapped candidates as per the government's norms.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity for the position of Junior Research Fellow at IIT BHU.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
